delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete Api Access Token {{ id }}?
delete.message: This removes the token and its permissions. Historical API ingestion records are preserved and remain visible through snapshot fields.

create.help: Enter a name only. The server generates the token secret and shows it once after creation.
create.rawTokenMessage: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
